name: ai-spend-auditor
description: Autonomous financial investigation system for startups

scripts.demo: bun run src/cli/index.tsx init --company Demo && bun run src/cli/index.tsx ingest test-data/subscriptions.csv && bun run src/cli/index.tsx ingest test-data/usage.csv && bun run src/cli/index.tsx ingest test-data/transactions.csv && bun run src/cli/index.tsx ingest test-data/expense-reports.csv && bun run src/cli/index.tsx ingest test-data/committed-expenses.csv && bun run src/cli/index.tsx investigate && bun run src/cli/index.tsx findings && bun run src/cli/index.tsx status && bun run src/cli/index.tsx report
